Case Study • Various

How we helped Luthra Group Unveils Annual Sustainability Reports with Growlity’s Expertise

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Growlity is proud to announce its successful collaboration with Luthra Group in the publication of their Annual Sustainability Report for FY 2023-24, marking the three consecutive years of partnership in sustainability reporting. This milestone further solidifies Growlity’s expertise in ESG and sustainability consulting and advisory, ensuring that Luthra Group’s reporting aligns with Global Reporting Initiative (GRI) Standards while maintaining a visually compelling and insightful presentation of their ESG journey and impact for circular economy business.

The unveiling of Luthra Group’s latest Sustainability and ESG Report took place during their 54th National Safety Week celebrations on 7th March 2025, an event that underscored the organization’s dedication to safety, environmental compliance, and responsible business practices. The event was attended by esteemed dignitaries, including Shri R.A. Patel, Joint Director of Industrial Safety and Health, Surat, and Dr. Jignasa Oza, Regional Officer, Gujarat Pollution Control Board, Surat.

Dr. Nitin Dumasia, President & CEO of Growlity Inc., was invited as a key guest at the event, where he shared valuable insights into the ESG framework, Net Zero strategies, and the evolving sustainability landscape. His address emphasized the growing importance of integrating ESG principles into corporate strategies to drive long-term value creation and compliance with global sustainability expectations.

The 2023-24 report, along with the previous FY 2021-22 and FY 2022-23 reports, has evolved through a collaborative effort between Growlity’s domain experts and Luthra Group’s internal team. Our role extended beyond technical reporting—we provided strategic guidance on sustainability goals, data structuring, and impactful storytelling to enhance stakeholder engagement. The final outcome is a testament to Luthra Group’s unwavering commitment to transparency, sustainable development, and corporate responsibility.

Quotes from Leadership

Mr. Girish Luthra, Chairman of Luthra Group, stated:

“Sustainability is an integral part of our business ethos. Our continued collaboration with Growlity has enabled us to set new benchmarks in ESG reporting and responsible corporate stewardship. This report reflects our unwavering commitment to sustainability and transparent business practices.”

Mr. Ashish Mehta, Vice President of Luthra Group, added:

“Publishing our third consecutive sustainability report is a significant achievement for us. With Growlity’s expertise and strategic guidance, we have been able to enhance the depth and quality of our disclosures, ensuring they align with global sustainability standards and best practices.”

Mr. Shwetang Kapadia, Vice President of Growlity’s ESG Advisory Services

“Working with Luthra Group has been an inspiring journey. Their proactive approach to sustainability and ESG compliance showcases true leadership in responsible business practices. We are honored to support them in shaping a more sustainable future.”

As businesses worldwide accelerate their ESG efforts, Growlity remains dedicated to supporting organizations like Luthra Group in achieving sustainability excellence. Our expertise in ESG advisory, sustainability disclosures, and compliance reporting empowers businesses to navigate complex ESG frameworks and enhance their global credibility.

We congratulate Luthra Group on this achievement and look forward to continuing our partnership in their sustainability journey.

About Growlity

Growlity is a global leader in ESG and sustainability consulting, providing expert guidance in sustainability reporting, compliance, net zero strategies, and responsible business practices. Our mission is to empower organizations with innovative and effective ESG solutions to drive long-term impact and success.

For more information about Growlity’s ESG & Sustainability services, visit www.growlity.com or contact us at contact@growlity.com.
